title: Sheet Metal Gauge & Dual-Sided Round Thickness Metal Gauge - Wire Gauge Measurement Tool Stainless Steel Welding Gage Material Wire Gauge (Set of 3)
features: Package Include: 2pcs metal sheets welding thickness gauge and 1pc round dual sided wire cable sheet gage in one set, help you get accurate data quickly and avoid unnecessary errors. Choose the appropriate one that meets your needs
Easy to Carry: These tools with the keychain and pouch bag are small in size, you can put them in your pocket or attach them to your inspection tool kit

Simple to Use: Useful to check metal sheet thickness or wire diameter before welding and working. Simply press the teeth against the object to match the contour. The numbers etched into the surface, easy to read
Good Material: Made of high quality stainless steel, the wire gauge measurement tools are durable, anti-rust, corrosion resistant and not easy to deform

Widely Used: The dual-sided round wire cable sheet gage is suitable for gauging uncoated sheet, wire, plate iron and steel, paper, leather, bolt, wood etc. And the wire metal sizes thickness gauge is for measuring the metal sheet wire size
description: Product Description These tools with the keychain and pouch bag are small in size, you can put them in your pocket or attach them to your inspection tool kit PACKAGE CONTENT Metal Sheet Thickness Gauge with Keychain x 2 Mini Portable Dual-Sided Round Metal Sheet Gauge x 1 Pouch bag x 1 FEATURES 2 types in one set Wide application Good quality Easy to carry and store
